footer_powered_by: Powered by Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
upload_subtitle: kapa clique ho batla / sebedisa khamera
select_prompt: Kgetha e tshwanang le mmela wa hao
select_subtitle: Tobetsa karete ho kgetha, ebe o netefatsa
result_treatment_sub: Latela mehato ena ho alafa sehlahla sa hao
result_prevention_sub: Boloka sehlahla sa hao se hlokahala ka mehato ena
result_healthy_msg: Dinletso tse ntle! Sehlahla sa hao se bonahala se hlokahala.
result_healthy_sub: Latela dikeletso tsena ho boloka jwalo.
result_at_risk_msg: Sehlahla sa hao ha se a infectiwa empa se bontsha ditshwaelo tsa pele.
result_at_risk_sub: Sebetsa hona jwale ho thibela lefu.
result_infected_msg: Lefu le fumanwe sehlahleni sa hao.
result_infected_sub: Latela lenaneo la kalafo le ka tlase hang hang.
result_export_footer: Powered by AgroSense — Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
error_unexpected_response: Server returned an unexpected response. Check Django logs.
error_network_prod_cross_origin: Cannot reach the API (wrong URL, CORS, or backend waking/sleeping on Render). Confirm VITE_API_BASE_URL has no typo; on Render set CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS to this site's exact https origin (and preview URLs if you use them). Retry after 30-60s on cold start.
error_network_prod_same_origin: Cannot reach the API. Same-origin /api should proxy via repo-root vercel.json. Update the rewrite destination to your Render URL, redeploy Vercel, or set VITE_API_BASE_URL to that URL and redeploy.
error_network_dev: Cannot reach the API. Local dev: (1) In backend: pip install -r requirements.txt && python manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:8000 (2) In frontend: npm run dev. Leave VITE_API_BASE_URL empty in frontend/.env so /api proxies to Django.
error_file_size: Setshwantsho se tlameha ho ba ka tlase ho 10MB.
error_file_type: Kenya setshwantsho sa jpg, png, kapa webp.
error_no_results: Ha ho mmela o tshwanang. Leka setshwantsho se hlakileng.
history_empty: Ha ho tlhahlobo hajoale. Hlahloba mmela wa hao wa pele!
history_empty_sub: Dintlha tsa hao tsa nakong e fetileng di tla bonaha mona.
history_clear_confirm: Na o netefatsa hore o batla ho phimola nalane yohle ya tlhahlobo?
settings_language_sub: Kgetha puo eo o e ratang
settings_theme_sub: Kgetha mowa wa lesedi kapa lefifi
settings_notifications_sub: Bontsha dikgopotso tsa tlhokomelo ya mmela
settings_clear_history_sub: Phimola direkoto tsohle tsa tlhahlobo tse fetileng
settings_built_with: E hahilwe ka Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
settings_dark_soon: Mowa wa lefifi o a tla kapele!
lab_precision_body: Dimodeli tsa rona di rutwe ka disampole tse fetang 500,000 tsa dimela tsa sebakeng tse netefaditsweng.
expert_insights_body: Fumana dikgothaletso tsa kalafo ya organiki le mekgwa ya thibelo hang hang.
camera_error_denied: Camera access denied. Please allow camera permissions and try again.
rightpanel_home_desc: Kenya senepe sa meroho efe kapa efe u fumane tekolo ya bophelo bjo thehilweng ke AI ka tlase ga metsotso e 8.
rightpanel_feature_langs_body: Tekolo ka Sezulu, Sesotho, Kiswahili le tse ling
rightpanel_result_title: Sena ke seo re se fumaneng.
rightpanel_result_desc: Hlahloba bophelo bja mmela wa hao o latela mehato e kgutsitsweng mona tlase.
rightpanel_tip_1: Nka disenenepe ka lesedi la letsatsi la tlwaelo bakeng sa meputso e molemo
rightpanel_tip_2: Ikatile maqhubu kapa meriri e amehang
rightpanel_tip_3: Hlahloba beke le beke ho latedisa pholo ya mmela
rightpanel_tip_4: Arola ditlamorollo le motlaei wa dimela wa heno
rightpanel_history_desc: Dihlahlobo tse 20 tsa ho qetela di boloka ka ho iketsahala. Tobetsa ho keneng kapa efe ho sheba tekolo e felletseng.
rightpanel_history_auto_body: Hlahlobo e nngwe le e nngwe e bolokwa sedifelong sa hao
rightpanel_history_limit_body: Tse kgale di tloswa ka ho iketsahala
rightpanel_settings_desc: Beha puo le dikgetho tsa hao. Dipehelo di boloka ka ho iketsahala sedifelong sa hao.
rightpanel_supported_langs_sub: UI le phetolelo ya tekolo ya AI
